properties.name: Authentication
properties.description: Verifies the identity of users, devices, or virtual resources before granting access or trusting data in the Digital Twin.

properties.name: Integrity
properties.description: Ensures data, models, and software have not been altered or corrupted—critical when sensor data and VRs drive physical actions.

properties.name: Confidentiality
properties.description: Protects sensitive DT data and communications from unauthorized disclosure across physical, intermediate, and digital layers.

properties.name: Privacy
properties.description: Protects personal or sensitive information beyond raw confidentiality, including minimization and controlled use in analytics and VRs.

properties.name: Availability
properties.description: Keeps DT services, synchronization, and visualization operational; DoS and resource attacks target this property directly.

properties.name: Authorization
properties.description: Enforces who may access which data, models, or controls—complementing authentication with least-privilege policies.
